case_title: MAURICIO, LUCHO R. VS ALEXANDER MANUFACTURING INC.

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF MAY-12-1997, DENIED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAURICIO, LUCHO R. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ALEXANDER MANUFACTURING INC. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WORK PERFORMED TO PLFT FOR THE PERIOD OF 12/10/96-12/16/96 WAS PERFORMED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AT THE REQUEST & INSTRUCTION OF THE GENERAL CONTRACTOR, & WITHOUT THE AGREEMENT OF THE DEFT.
